description: Review fixes - Address 4 issues from the semantic review: make Discover page cards navigable, scope transition-premium to specific properties, remove orphaned Skeleton components, and consolidate error page patterns.
steps: Wrap trending song cards in Link to /track/[id], new release cards in Link to /album/[id], and featured album cards in Link to /album/[id] on the Discover page.
Scope .transition-premium in globals.css from transition: all to transition: transform, box-shadow, border-color, color, opacity.
Remove orphaned Skeleton components (SkeletonText, SkeletonCircle, SkeletonCard) that are no longer imported anywhere, keeping only SkeletonGrid if needed.
Update track/[id]/error.tsx to use the same premium inline error pattern as app/error.tsx, with Header component for navigation consistency.
acceptance_criteria: Discover page trending song cards link to /track/[id]
Discover page new release cards link to /album/[id]
Discover page featured album cards link to /album/[id]
transition-premium utility scoped to transform, box-shadow, border-color, color, opacity
No orphaned/unused Skeleton component exports remain
Error pages share a consistent premium pattern with proper navigation
